mapper.select: select * from exp_reimbursement where reimburse_id = #{reimburseId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into exp_reimbursement(reimburse_no, proj_id, proj_name, node_id, node_name, category_id, category_name, expense_type, expense_date, amount, expense_desc, invoice_count, status, submit_time, approve_by, approve_time, reject_reason, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values(#{reimburseNo}, #{projId}, #{projName}, #{nodeId}, #{nodeName}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{expenseType}, #{expenseDate}, #{amount}, #{expenseDesc}, #{invoiceCount}, #{status}, #{submitTime}, #{approveBy}, #{approveTime}, #{rejectReason}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update exp_reimbursement set del_flag = '1' where reimburse_id = #{reimburseId}
